haiku45.summary_excerpt: Script logic is sound and bash practices solid (set -euo pipefail, error handling, quoting). BUT: Deliverable is fundamentally incomplete per requirements. Missing: (1) bats-core test suite (required by task), (2) TDD methodology (write failing test first), (3) test harness in workflow (required to run tests via act), (4) act-result.txt artifact output, (5) actionlint validation step. Workflow has unpinned action ref (v4 instead of SHA—security violation). Task explicitly requires tests executab

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent script and workflow. Native Bash globbing, regex parsing, and arrays are used effectively. Logic gracefully handles edge cases (whitespace, CRLF, missing newlines). Clean CI integration.
